sentences.arabic: يَبِيعُ الوَلَدُ عَصِيرَ البُرْتُقَالِ أَمَامَ بَيْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak prodaje sok od naranče ispred kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The boy sells orange juice in front of his house.

sentences.arabic: يَضَعُ العَصِيرَ فِي كَأْسٍ كَبِيرٍ بِسِعْرٍ رَخِيصٍ.
sentences.translation: Stavlja sok u veliku čašu po jeftinoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: He puts the juice in a large glass at a cheap price.

sentences.translation: Komšije kupuju od njega svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbors buy from him every day.

sentences.translation: Skuplja novac i pažljivo ga štedi.
sentences.translationEn: He collects his money and saves it carefully.
